sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33325" key="e)laio/broxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιό-βροχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33325.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soaked in oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
